resultList.dtldesc: Luxurious 4 BHK Villa for Sale in Sunder Greendale, Kompally, Hyderabad. Presenting an expansive and elegantly planned 4 BHK villa in the prestigious residential enclave of Sunder Greendale, Kompally. Designed for those who value space, privacy, and refined living, this ready-to-move residence offers a harmonious blend of luxury and functionality within a serene gated community environment.::::::::Property Specifications::::Spanning a substantial super built-up area of approximately 4554 sq. ft, this unfurnished villa provides ample scope for bespoke interior design and personalised styling. The residence comprises four generously sized bedrooms and five well-appointed bathrooms, ensuring comfort and convenience for large families. Two balconies enhance the openness of the home, allowing natural light and ventilation to flow seamlessly through the interiors.The layout has been thoughtfully curated to include multiple additional rooms such as a dedicated puja room, study room, store room, and a servant room. These supplementary spaces significantly enhance practicality and support a well-organised lifestyle. The living and dining areas are spaciously proportioned, making them ideal for hosting gatherings and family interactions.This east-facing villa aligns with Vastu principles and welcomes abundant morning sunlight, contributing to a bright and positive ambience. The property enjoys pleasing views of the garden, park, pool, and main road, offering a balanced combination of greenery and accessibility. Offered on a freehold basis, the villa ensures complete ownership rights and long-term security.::::Facilities::::Located within an established gated community, the property benefits from organised infrastructure and a well-maintained residential setting. The ready-to-move status allows immediate possession, eliminating construction wait times. The expansive floor plan provides flexibility for interior customisation, enabling homeowners to design luxurious living spaces tailored to their preferences.::::::::Locality::::Kompally is one of Hyderabads rapidly developing residential corridors, known for its wide roads, improved connectivity, and growing social infrastructure. The locality offers convenient access to schools, supermarkets, healthcare facilities, and entertainment hubs. Its strategic connectivity to key commercial zones makes it a preferred choice for professionals and families seeking a peaceful yet accessible address.This 4 BHK villa in Sunder Greendale presents an exceptional opportunity for discerning buyers seeking a spacious, east-facing freehold home within a premium residential community in Kompally.

resultList.dtldesc: Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted 3 BHK Flat available for sale in S.P. Nagar, Hyderabad Designed for ultimate comfort, this spacious home offers stylish interiors, lavish living spaces and easy access to major destinations, offering an ideal place to settle down with your loved ones and enjoy a vibrant, modern living experience.Property Specifications Currently under construction and set for possession by October 2025, this spacious residence offers you a super built-up area of 1525 sq ft. Vastu-Shastra friendly, this east-facing flat is thoughtfully designed to maximize space, cross ventilation and natural light. Situated on the first floor in an apartment of 5 floors, this residence features three well-appointed bedrooms and three western bathrooms where two bathrooms are attached, and the bathroom is available for common use. There is also a separate living and dining area as well as a spacious balcony attached to the living area that overlooks the road, offering a refreshing outdoor space to unwind. Installed with a granite platform, a stainless steel sink, and a dedicated utility space is the kitchen, which offers ample cooking space. Every inch of the flooring has vitrified tiles for the flooring enhances the aesthetics while ensuring durability.Facilities To provide a secure and hassle-free living experience, this apartment is well-equipped with modern facilities, such as a covered parking space, ensuring vehicle safety. There is also 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup, guaranteeing uninterrupted daily life, while round-the-clock security with CCTV surveillance ensures peace of mind. The presence of a dedicated security guard further enhances the safety of residents. A well-maintained lift provides ease of access, making this home a perfect blend of luxury and convenience.Locality Strategically located just two plots away from the 100-foot-wide Moula Ali Road leading to ECIL Cross Road, this property enjoys excellent connectivity. The prominent HDFC Bank is the key landmark to this property from where the famous AMR Mall is at a kilometer range. Some of the prominent schools and hospitals are all within a 1 km radius, offering unparalleled convenience. Cabs, taxis, buses and autos are easily accessible, promising seamless travel to different parts of Hyderabad.

resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 3 BHK apartment in Kokapet, Hyderabad, offers a premier urban living experience within the prestigious Hallmark Treasor project. Spanning a generous super area of 1765 sq. ft, this newly constructed residence is situated on the 23rd floor of a magnificent 29-storey tower. The property stands as a testament to contemporary architecture, providing residents with breathtaking views of the city skyline and a serene environment high above the vibrant streets of West Hyderabad.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment is meticulously designed to offer a spacious and airy living environment, perfect for a modern family. It features three well-appointed bedrooms and three bathrooms, ensuring ample privacy and convenience for all occupants. As an unfurnished unit, it presents a versatile blank canvas for homeowners to customise the interiors to their specific professional and personal tastes. The layout includes a private balcony that allows for natural light and cross-ventilation, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere throughout the home. Being a new construction, the property integrates the latest building standards and high-quality finishes.::::Facilities::::Hallmark Treasor is equipped with a comprehensive array of world-class facilities designed to enhance the lifestyle of its residents. The project features a grand clubhouse, a fully equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool, and dedicated areas for meditation and indoor games. For sports enthusiasts, there are badminton and squash courts, as well as multipurpose courts. The building ensures smooth accessibility with high-speed elevators and prioritises safety with a multi-tier security system. Essential utilities, including 24-hour water supply, power backup, and reserved parking, are seamlessly integrated into the development. Residents can also enjoy a coffee lounge, a library, and guest accommodation within the premises.::::Locality::::Situated in the rapidly developing commercial and residential hub of Kokapet, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to the rest of Hyderabad via the Outer Ring Road. The locality is home to several reputed educational institutions, such as Phoenix Greens International School and Rockwell International School, both located within a short distance. Quality healthcare is easily accessible at the nearby VisLon Hospital. For shopping and leisure, Mn Capital and various supermarkets are within close reach. The strategic location near major commercial hubs like Kokapet Terminal makes it an ideal choice for professionals seeking a balance between work and a high-quality residential neighbourhood.

resultList.dtldesc: Elegant 3 BHK Apartment for Sale in Om Sree Signet, Yapral, HyderabadExperience luxurious and convenient living in this fully furnished 3 BHK apartment located in the prestigious Om Sree Signet project, Yapral, Hyderabad. Ideal for families and professionals seeking a ready-to-move home, this property combines spacious interiors, modern amenities, and a well-planned layout, offering a comfortable lifestyle within a gated community that emphasises both privacy and convenience.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 2nd floor of an 8-storey building, the apartment spans a super built-up area of 3,050 sq. ft. It features three bedrooms, four bathrooms, and a single balcony overlooking the society, providing abundant natural light and ventilation. The living and dining areas are designed separately, allowing for functional and elegant use of space. The modular kitchen comes with a chimney and piped gas connection, supporting modern culinary needs. Finished with vitrified tiles, the apartment is west-facing, fully furnished, and part of a thoughtfully maintained community of 80 flats, reflecting quality construction and attention to detail.FacilitiesThe property includes two covered parking spaces, lift access across all floors, and a comprehensive security system with guards and CCTV. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup, ensuring uninterrupted daily living. The gated complex offers a wide range of lifestyle amenities, including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gym, function hall, basketball and tennis courts, and an in-complex supermarket, supporting both recreation and convenience within the community.LocalityLocated in Yapral, the apartment enjoys excellent connectivity and access to essential services. Schools and hospitals are conveniently situated within 1 km of the society, while banks, ATMs, and retail outlets are easily accessible nearby. The neighbourhood combines a peaceful residential setting with proximity to urban conveniences, providing both comfort and practicality. Public transport options and road access enhance connectivity to other parts of Hyderabad, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a secure, well-equipped home in a thriving locality.This 3 BHK apartment in Om Sree Signet offers a perfect blend of space, amenities, and location, presenting an exceptional opportunity for those seeking a premium, fully furnished residence in Yapral, Hyderabad.
